commands.review_summary:
The branch updates daemon safe-restart CLI help, deferred restart status text, daemon docs, and a test-project golden expectation.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +1, Docs 0. Total +9 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main rejects `--safe --wait` and `--force --wait`, applies the bounded `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` deferral, and leaves command-facing docs/help with unbounded-drain wording. I did not run the CLI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed for the copy/docs fixes and external real CLI proof; automation should not be queued while the contributor-side proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(cli): clarify safe restart bounded-then-force behavior in help and docs
target.body:
## Summary
Clarify that `daemon restart --safe` uses a bounded deferred wait (default 5 minutes via `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs`) and may force a restart after the timeout expires. Update CLI help text, user-facing status messages, and daemon docs to reflect the actual bounded-then-force behavior.

Fixes #92194

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

**Behavior addressed**: The `--safe` restart CLI help and docs described "restart after active work drains" without mentioning the bounded default wait or that the restart can be forced after the `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` budget expires. Users relied on `--safe` semantics and were surprised when active work was cut.

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node 22.19, Linux
- **Code analysis path**: See root cause analysis (5 Whys) in commit
- **Test framework**: Vitest

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
cd /home/0668001085/workspace/openclaw-worktrees/fix/issue-92194
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/restart.test.ts
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/cli/daemon.md
npx oxlint --tsconfig=tsconfig.json src/cli/daemon-cli/register-service-commands.ts src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.ts
```

**After-fix evidence**:
```
✓ 3 test files passed (39 tests)
✓ Docs MDX check passed
✓ oxlint: no issues
```

**Observed result after the fix**: CLI `--help` output, deferred restart status messages, and daemon docs now accurately describe the bounded-then-force default behavior of `--safe` restart and point operators to `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs=0` for indefinite wait.

**What was not tested**: Live `openclaw daemon restart --safe` CLI command execution (docs/help-text-only change, no runtime behavior modified).

## Tests and validation
| Test Type | Result | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Unit Tests | ✅ | 39/39 passed (lifecycle 25, restart.deferral-timeout 7, restart 7) |
| Type Check | ✅ | No type errors in changed files |
| Lint | ✅ | oxlint clean, oxfmt compliant |
| Docs Check | ✅ | check-docs-mdx passed |

## Risk checklist
**Did user-visible behavior change?** `No` - Only CLI help text, status messages, and documentation wording changed. Runtime restart behavior is unchanged.
**Did config, environment, or migration behavior change?** `No`
**Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change?** `No`

## Current review state
**What is the next action?** Maintainer review requested
target.author: zhangqueping
